Off Calendar Dec-02-2008 Continued To Feb-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elaine Ercolini for Donald Hurt (Executor).

Ms. Ercolini stated that the Petition To Confirm Real Property had been filed on the Trust matter and was to be heard on February 3, 2009. In addition, she requested a continuance stating that an inventory could not be done until a determination on the status of the property was made. The matter was continued to February 17, 2009.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Carlito Mandia, CSR 689. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
